content_html:
20th May 2026

  • More color! Bar and waffle charts without a color column are shaded by magnitude with a sequential color scheme; color columns holding text values use the
    • observable10
    categorical scheme. #2
  • Now checks
    • execute-sql
    permission before running the query to find the column names.
  • Charts now display interactive tooltips.
  • Fixed a bug where
    • waffleY
    charts were not described to the agent.

Recent articles

  • Datasette Agent- 21st May 2026
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash: more expensive, but Google plan to use it for everything- 19th May 2026
  • The last six months in LLMs in five minutes- 19th May 2026
